summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Arena - Prediction Market Platform. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads without errors, ticker displays statistics, Connect Wallet button present, and navigation fully functional.

design_issues.issue: React warning about non-boolean 'active' prop being sent to DOM - should use transient prop '$active'

passed_tests: Contract config endpoint (proper BSC testnet config)
Markets list endpoint (0 markets - expected for new deployment)
Ticker data endpoint (8 ticker items loaded)
Connect Wallet button present and functional
Navigation tabs (Arena, Duels, Analyst Leagues) working
Statistics display working (Active Markets: 0, Total Volume: $0)
